context: Tests whether the agent produces a complete setup guide and bootstrap script that covers account creation, key generation steps, permission configuration, validation, storage, and user messaging as specified in the ElevenLabs setup workflow.

checklist.name: API keys page URL
checklist.description: The setup guide or script output includes the URL https://elevenlabs.io/app/settings/api-keys

checklist.name: Sign-up URL
checklist.description: The setup guide or script output includes the URL https://elevenlabs.io/app/sign-up for account creation

checklist.name: Create key steps
checklist.description: The guide includes steps for creating a key: clicking 'Create key', naming the key, and confirming creation

checklist.name: Permission setting guidance
checklist.description: The guide mentions setting permissions on the API key, referencing 'User' permission or 'Read' access level

checklist.name: Copy immediately warning
checklist.description: The guide warns that the key is only shown once and should be copied immediately

checklist.name: Validation endpoint
checklist.description: The script validates the key using https://api.elevenlabs.io/v1/user

checklist.name: xi-api-key header
checklist.description: The script uses 'xi-api-key' as the authentication header name

checklist.name: ELEVENLABS_API_KEY in .env
checklist.description: The script saves the validated key as ELEVENLABS_API_KEY in a .env file

checklist.name: Two-step workflow
checklist.description: The bootstrap follows a two-phase approach: first displaying setup instructions, then collecting and validating the key (not interleaved)

checklist.name: Success message
checklist.description: After successful setup, the script displays a confirmation that the key has been stored in .env

checklist.name: Security reminder
checklist.description: The script or guide includes a reminder to keep the key safe or not share it

checklist.name: Retry on invalid key
checklist.description: The script allows the user to retry if the first key validation fails, but limits to at most 2 total attempts
